title: ACX CAL Skill Set (acx.cal-skillset/1)
description: The BPM participation declaration stored IN a cartridge (rom/cal/skillset.json, ROM-signed): which roles it plays, which other agents it references (by hash), and which loops it participates in.

canComplete.description: skill names this agent can run to completion (incl. skill scripts)

references.description: other agents this one hands off to / references, by content hash

processes.description: CAL ids this agent participates in
